renames.rationale: Builds 'Description: ...; ec: ...' diagnostic string; widely called by error paths in service/install code.
String tag 'delete_service'; opens SCM, OpenServiceW, DeleteService, CloseServiceHandle with err logging.
Calls ControlService; logs 'ControlService failed'; helper for stop/pause via SCM control codes.
Inner helper: StartServiceW + wait_service_to_stop + logs 'StartServiceW failed' under 'start_service' tag.
Top-level 'start_service' orchestrator: open_sc_manager, open_service, wait_to_stop/start, calls start_service_inner.
Top-level stop_service: open_sc_manager/open_service then calls stop_service_inner; matching error log strings.
String tag 'enable_service_autostart'; opens SCM/service then ChangeServiceConfigW via 14002b740.
Wraps ChangeServiceConfig2W with err logging 'ChangeServiceConfig2W failed'.
String tag 'set_service_launch_type'; opens SCM/service then ChangeServiceConfig2W via 14002bba0.
String tag 'wait_service_to_start'; QueryServiceStatus polling loop with Sleep/GetTickCount.
String tag 'wait_service_to_stop'; QueryServiceStatus polling loop with Sleep/GetTickCount.
